@graph.description: Echinacoside is a phenylethanoid glycoside found in Echinacea and Cistanche-related materials. It is mainly characterized by antioxidant, neuroprotective, and anti-inflammatory preclinical research rather than strong human intervention data.
@graph.name: echinacoside
